description: Composition Blue, red, and mustard check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front button placket, full sleeves, pocket on the left chest with branding, and a curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Pair this with jeans and sneakers to complete your look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
